svg.title: GCS to Cloud Dataflow to BigQuery data pipeline block diagram
svg.desc: Block diagram showing data flowing from employees.csv in Google Cloud Storage through Cloud Dataflow (with UDF transformation and schema mapping) into a BigQuery dataset and table.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about how employees.csv is stored in Google Cloud Storage')
sendPrompt('What does the udf.js transformation function do in Cloud Dataflow?')
sendPrompt('How does bigquery-schema.json map the transformed rows?')
sendPrompt('What is a schemaless BigQuery dataset?')
sendPrompt('How are employee records stored in the BigQuery table?')
